name: KARTHIKEYAN R
title: Senior Frontend Engineer (React / Next.js) | 10+ Years Experience
professional_summary: Senior Frontend Engineer with 10+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Proven expertise in frontend architecture, performance optimization, and data-intensive dashboards for enterprise and AI/ML-driven platforms. Strong experience in designing end-to-end workflow systems, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and translating complex backend and AI processes into intuitive user interfaces. Passionate about clean architecture, system scalability, and global-ready (i18n) applications.
core_skills: Tailwind CSS, Material UI (MUI), shadcn/ui, Bootstrap
Data Fetching & Caching: TanStack Query (React Query), Axios
Performance Optimization: Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, FID), Code Splitting, Lazy Loading, Memoization
Single Page Applications (SPA), Frontend Architecture & System Design (Scalable UI Systems)
Frontend Security: XSS, CSRF Protection, Secure Auth Flows
Backend Integration: Node.js, Express.js (integration), REST APIs,Firebase
AI-assisted Development: GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cursor AI, Codeium
